name: Pinterest
description: Pinterest is a visual discovery engine for finding ideas like recipes, home and style inspiration, and more.

auth_methods.note: Documentation shows OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow and PKCE; token endpoint and authorization endpoint provided.

credential_access.note: Developers can register apps in the Pinterest developer portal to obtain client credentials; may require account verification.

api_surface.note: Pinterest provides a v5 REST API covering boards, pins, ads, users, etc.

buildability.note: Public REST API with OAuth 2.0; developer must sign up and obtain client credentials (app registration) to use.

queries: Pinterest developers OAuth 2.0 PKCE Authorization Code Flow
